name: @hypaware/hermes
description: Hermes Agent client adapter for HypAware. Reads Hermes's own state.db read-only (LLP 0119) and materializes sessions/messages into ai_gateway_messages via the shared ai_gateway.projected_exchange materializer (LLP 0120): a backfill provider for history and a poll source for ongoing capture. No gateway proxying, no changes to Hermes.

config_sections.summary: Hermes adapter config: enabled, state_db (override), poll_interval.
